title: Daughter Finds Mother's Decapitated Body In Backyard
description:
👉 Try the ORIGINAL RESIN at https://tinyurl.com/ShopRESIN and use code "INSANITY10" at checkout for an extra 10% OFF on your purchase!

----------
Thirty days ago, 53-year-old David Callahan killed his girlfriend, Martha Robin Freitag, and buried her body in his own backyard.

David thinks he's gotten away with his horrific crime…. Martha was mentally ill, had few friends, and no one was supposed to come looking for her.

Martha's daughter, Kim, was the only person concerned about her mother's whereabouts... 

Kim thinks David had something to do with her mother's disappearance. But with no proof of a crime, Officers don't believe her…

However in the weeks that follow, Kim will do everything in her power to find Martha, force police to act, and lead them to one of the most gruesome discoveries of their lives….
-------
